scene_summary: A modern light-luxury dining-room interior scene with a dining table, chairs, wall panels, decorative artwork, and ceiling lighting.
albedo_material_notes: The lower wall section is dark-gray paneling with gold decorative lines; both are intrinsic material colors.
The dining chairs have blue upholstered cushions with gold metallic frames as intrinsic colors.
The tabletop is white marble with natural light stone veining that is intrinsic texture.
The wall artwork has a light-gray base and blue lower pattern, both intrinsic colors.
The floor is light-gray marble with natural light stone texture as intrinsic texture.
albedo_lighting_notes: Bright spots on the floor and table caused by ceiling lighting are highlights, not intrinsic material color.
Dark regions under chairs and beneath the table are shadows, not intrinsic material color.
Over-bright regions near windows are exposure effects, not intrinsic material color.
Locally bright wall areas are caused by overhead lighting and should be corrected to remove illumination influence.
albedo_prompt_suffix: Preserve the panel gold lines, artwork patterns, intrinsic stone textures, and intrinsic colors of all objects, while fully removing shadows, highlights, exposure artifacts, and any illumination-driven brightness variation.

per_view.albedo_hint: Remove strong floor highlights and shadows beneath chairs, while preserving intrinsic colors and textures of tableware and wall artwork.
